overview.description: The State Street My2029 Municipal Bond ETF (MYMI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund of investment grade municipal bonds with effective maturities in 2029. Bonds are USD-denominated. MYMI was launched on Sep 23, 2024 and is issued by State Street.
